headline: Kavinga Perera wins Most Popular Actor of the Year

content.text: Kavinga Perera and the award record

Kavinga Perera is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Most Popular Actor of the Year. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Kavinga Perera, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

IMDb identifies Kavinga Perera as an actor known for Kalu Hima, Thuththiri, and Nimi. The GBE archive records his award as Most Popular Actor of the Year. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
